bugs.error_message: GrowTree spell broken — trees not planting (user report: tree planting not working)
bugs.root_cause: A prior uncommitted refactor deleted the unitCone/unitIco geometry helpers as 'unused', but makeTreeMesh still calls them (lines 184/202) for canopy meshes → ReferenceError on every spawnTree, so GrowTree and natural vegetation tree builds failed
bugs.fix: Restored the unitCone and unitIco cached-geometry helpers in AssetFactory.js

bugs.root_cause: Code path had no error handling — exceptions would propagate uncaught

bugs.error_message: Graphics pop in late after the title screen appears (user: add loading time, verify loaded before opening)
bugs.root_cause: Shaders compile lazily on first render and the shadow map is empty, so the world appears piecemeal behind/after the title overlay
bugs.fix: Loading veil in index.html (painted pre-bundle) removed only after renderer.compileAsync(scene,camera) + 2 warm-up frames with forced shadow pass; window.__gameReady QA flag; loop starts after boot()

bugs.error_message: Underwater looks transparent instead of bluish (user report)
bugs.root_cause: Water material was FrontSide (surface invisible from below) and nothing tinted the view when the camera submerged — Sky's clear-air fog kept rendering
bugs.fix: side: DoubleSide on water material; per-frame underwater override of fog color/density (Water runs after Sky in SYSTEM_ORDER so the override wins) + fullscreen #mw-underwater tint veil with ~0.3s ease
